# AI Trading System — LLM Index
> Open-source autonomous SPY iron condor trading system with defined risk, continuous learning, and strict safety gates.

## North Star
$6,000/month after-tax passive income via SPY iron condors.

## URLs
- Progress Dashboard: https://igorganapolsky.github.io/trading/rag-query/
- Repository: https://github.com/IgorGanapolsky/trading
- Blog: https://igorganapolsky.github.io/trading/

## Content
- Blog posts: 2
- RAG lessons: 179
- CI workflows: 72
- Latest post: 2026-03-23

## Strategy
- SPY iron condors, 15-20 delta, $10-wide wings, 30-45 DTE
- Exit: 50% profit or 7 DTE, stop at 100% of credit
- Max 2 concurrent condors (8 legs), max 5% risk per position
- Backed by 71,417-trade study (projectfinance.com, 2007-2017)

## Tech
- Python 3.11, Alpaca API (paper + live), GRPO ML optimization
- LanceDB RAG over 179 lessons learned
- GitHub Actions CI/CD (72 workflows)
- Phil Town Rule #1 enforced at every layer: don't lose money

## Key Research
- [71K Iron Condor Trade Study](https://igorganapolsky.github.io/trading/2026/03/23/iron-condor-71k-trade-study/)
- [PaperBanana Architecture Diagrams](https://igorganapolsky.github.io/trading/2026/02/15/paperbanana-automated-architecture-diagrams/)
